notes:
Goal scorers, cards, and substitutions are now fetched reliably after every match.

Previously, a single network hiccup during result ingestion could silently prevent match events from ever being saved. Completed matches are now retried until their events are confirmed — so if a match finished without any goal scorers showing up, it will back-fill automatically on the next poll.
reminder: As there was some feedback regarding the Tournament predictions (champion + Golden Six), they are open again to be predicted, but ONLY today (12 June). You'll need to same them manually. Fill them in before midnight UTC if you haven't yet.
